case_title: MICHIAL D. ARNOLD et al VS. DANIELLE LYON et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYON, DANIELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON NOV. 29, 2010; $5,521.50 RENT, $500.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,021.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J. AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, DANIELLE DOES 1 TO 30, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J. SERVED OCT-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, DANIELLE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, DANIELLE
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS (SUMMARY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J.
DECLARATION OF PAULETTE FERSTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $500.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LYON, DANIELLE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30, INCL.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J. SERVED OCT-26-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHIAL D. MARTIN, FRANCIS J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYON, DANIELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1142-B CASTRO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
